titleStmt.title: SII 38.388: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 388. (A.R. No. 388 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Veṅkaṭadēva mahārāya Year: Śaka 1512, sukla, Tai 21. Monday, pūśa = irregular.

summary.p: This inscription contains the epithets of the ruling king, Veṅkaṭadēva mahārāya, son of Tirumalaidēva mahārāya, such as Rāyasuradhāraṇaṉ, Irāśidhirāsan, Rāsaparamēśvaraṉ, Rāśarishabharāśa Dēvēndrarāśasūḍāmaṇi, Navakōṭi Nārāyaṇaṉ, Ēkāṅgavīrāṉ and others.

It records the gift of land (which was situated) to the west of the temple at Dēvakkāpuram by Nayinnappanāyakkar, son of Kṛishṇappanāyakkar, to the temple at Dēvakkāpuram, for the merit of Koṇḍammāḷ, wife of Daḷavarāya Timmappanāyakkaraiyyaṉ and also for the sake of Sidisiraṉ and Periyanāyakkiammai. It further records that the land being a fallow, the donor reclaimed it, excavated tanks and dug wells and made it cultivable and donated it. The temple accountant Nallatambi figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastistrimanmahāmaṇḍalecura Ariyarāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭaṉāṭukoṇṭu
koṇṭaṉāṭu kuṭātāṉ tulukkataḷavipāṭaṉ tuluThe letter lu engraved below.kka mokām tavittāṉ yiḻamtiṟaikoṇṭa yintu rāyacurataraṇaṉ
yirācātirācaṉ rācaparamecuraṉ rācariṣapa rāca kuñcara yirāca maṉmata yirācarum yirācaṉārāyaṇaṉ (te) teventira rācacūṭāmaṇi
viraciṅkanāṉa pūṟuvatakṣaṇa paccimauttara cap(pi)tacamuttirātipati navakoṭinārāyaṇaṉ Ēkāṅkaviraṉ tiṉavātacūraṉ viru
tu nārapālaṉ keṭimaṉṉiyar curataraṇan śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecura tirumalaitevamakārāyar kumārar veṅkaṭa
teva maka(ā)rāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam 100 4 10 12kku melcellā niṉṟa cukkula varuṣam
taiyi mātam [2 10 1] § comavāramum pūcanakṣatramu vamum peṟṟaṉāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
palkuṉṟa koṭṭattu melkuṉṟaṉāṭu murukamaṅkalapaṟṟu rācakempira tuṟkattukku ceyyāṟṟukkuThis word is engraved below.teṉ
piṟivāṉa civaṉai kālukku vaṭapiṟivāna tevakkāpuram koyilukku kiḻaṇṭai kollaiyāyiruntatu kiṟaiyam paṇṇikoṇṭu
Eriyum veṭṭiviccu nilamtiruttiviccu kiṇaṟukaḷum Uṇṭākki taḷavarāya timmappaṉāyakkarayyaṉ peṇcāti koṇṭa
mmāḷukku puṇṇiyamāka citiciraṉukkum periyaṉāyakiyammaikkum payikkarattukku kiṣṇappaṉāyakkar kumārar nayinappaṉāyakkar
paṇṇivicca puṇṇiyam yinta puṇyattukku yātāmoruttar AkitamThese two letter are engraved below. niṉaittāl keṅkai karaiyile kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa
toṣattile pokakaṭavarākavum yivai koyilkaṇakku nallatampi Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 38.388 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
